description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a prominent handguard with multiple vent holes for heat dissipation and a flat-top receiver with an integrated carry handle and iron sights. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a flash hider, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The magazine is ribbed for grip and appears to be made of polymer or metal. The overall design is modular, with visible rails for mounting accessories. The rifle's construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary military or law enforcement firearms.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, and iron sights. It features a vented handguard, ergonomic pistol grip, and a flash hider at the barrel tip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and full length of the barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and handguard.
